# Dr. Jens Richter

> A Physicist in Mind, Developer by Heart, Engineer by Passion. CEO of DNA Evolutions and a hands-on engineer who builds JOpt, a Java route-optimization engine.

## About
Dr. Jens Richter (Dr.-Ing.) was born in Dresden, raised in Leverkusen, and lives
in Eschweiler near Aachen. A trained physicist, he now leads and builds
route-optimization software — turning chaotic real-world logistics into feasible,
optimal tours. He holds a PhD from RWTH Aachen in silicon photonics.

## Work
- **CEO of DNA Evolutions GmbH** (since 2026; Senior Java Engineer → Partner →
  Co-CEO → CEO — and still writes the Java).
- **JOpt**: a Java route/tour optimization engine. Handles vehicle routing, time
  windows, skills, hard constraints and multi-day planning; delivered natively in
  Java and as Spring WebFlux REST services.

## Research
- **PhD (Dr.-Ing. in Electrical Engineering), RWTH Aachen, 2018.** Thesis:
  "Ultra-high-Q inverted silica microtoroid resonators monolithically integrated
  into a silicon photonics platform." Official record:
  https://publications.rwth-aachen.de/record/749969

## Projects (all personal — besides the day job)
- **toPPT** — MATLAB → PowerPoint generator (~6.7k downloads, archived):
  https://github.com/jrichter24/toPPT
- **jonas-barney.com** — a self-published children's coloring book featuring his
  son Jonas and dog Barney: https://www.jonas-barney.com/
- **JonasBarneyPaint** — a browser paint studio (color the Jonas & Barney pages
  on screen, or paint anything): https://paint.jonas-barney.com/ ·
  source https://github.com/jrichter24/miniPaint
- **moldqueen** — control building-block RC toys through one clean API:
  https://jrichter24.github.io/moldqueen/ · repo https://github.com/jrichter24/moldqueen

## Writing

- German: https://jens.dev/de/writing/
